/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libwarehouse_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libwarehouse_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/warehouse_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/warehouse_interfaces/srv/assign_task__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mrinal/warehouse_ws/build/warehouse_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libwarehouse_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
